label: Required shear for m=0 stabilization scales with profile-dependent shear-free growth; m=1 needs a different mechanism

provenance.source_span: RESEARCH ARTICLE | DECEMBER 17 2020 Eigenmode analysis of the sheared-flow Z-pinch  J. R. Angus  ; J. J. Van De Wetering ; M. Dorf ; V. I. Geyko Phys. Plasmas 27, 122108 (2020) https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0029716  

strengths: Separates m=0 shear scaling from the unresolved m=1 mechanism.
weaknesses: The scaling is model/profile dependent and should not be treated as a universal threshold.
